narrative:
Springboro City 3-C (precinct in Warren County) has 1,107 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
